Off Calendar Dec-27-2005 Set For Trial On Jul-03-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-19-06 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 318

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Nov-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:


Appearance: Robert Wainess, for Plaintiff/Moving Party
Jeffrey H. Belote, for Defendant/Opposing Party

Ruling:
Hearing held - tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Application For Writ of Attachment is granted in the amount of $133,742.12. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000.
The court makes the following rulings on the parties' evidentiary objections:
The objections to the Yearwood declaration are sustained.
The objections to the Bennett declaration: are sustained as to 3:12-14, overruled as to 3:14-15, and overruled as to 3:24 - 4:23.
The objections to the Loach declaration are sustained as to 2:25-27 and 3:1-9, the objections to 4:7 are overruled, the objections to 4:10-12 and 4:14-19 and 4:21-23 are sustained.
The objections to the Buczek declaration are sustained as to 3:1-12 and 4:2-6.
The objection so the Belote declaration are overruled.
The objections to the Shepherd declaration at 2:25-27 are sustained as the are not admitted for the truth. The objections to 3:1-4, 3:5-6, 3:7-9, 3:14-18, 3:19-23, and 4:6-7 are overruled. The objections to 4:24-27 are sustained. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Nov-10-2005 Continued To Nov-23-05 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 612
